# CheckIn Card — llms.txt
# This file helps AI assistants understand what CheckIn Card is and does.

## What is CheckIn Card?

CheckIn Card (checkin-card.com) is a digital guest guide tool for hotel and short-term rental hosts. It allows hosts to create a personalized, mobile-friendly guest page that guests can open via a simple link — no app download required.

## What problem does it solve?

Hosts spend hours answering the same guest questions before and during every stay:
- How do I get in?
- What is the WiFi password?
- What time is check-in and check-out?
- Where can I park?
- What is nearby?

CheckIn Card consolidates all of this into one shareable link that the host sends at the time of booking.

## Who is it for?

- Independent hotel owners and boutique hotels
- Airbnb, Booking.com, and VRBO hosts
- Vacation rental managers
- Any short-term rental operator who wants to reduce guest questions and improve the check-in experience

## Key features

- Check-in and check-out times
- Entry instructions (smart lock codes, key safe, reception, meet host)
- WiFi name and password with QR code
- Google Maps link and route button
- House information and rules
- Reservation-specific info (parking, breakfast, restaurant menu PDF)
- Nearby places (supermarkets, restaurants, banks, museums, churches, transport)
- Contact / WhatsApp button
- Available in English, German, and Spanish
- No app needed for guests — works in any browser
- Optional hotel logo display
- Hotel-specific features: breakfast options, late checkout, reception hours

## Pricing

- Monthly plan: €5/month per property
- Yearly plan: €50/year per property (equivalent to €4.17/month)
- Free preview available before purchase

## Languages supported

English, German (Deutsch), Spanish (Español)

## Target markets

German-speaking countries (Germany, Austria, Switzerland), Spain, UK, and international short-term rental hosts.

## Company

CheckIn Card is an independent SaaS product for hospitality professionals.
Website: https://checkin-card.com
Contact: info@checkin-card.com
